title: Lattice Form Tile
description: A filler — leaf content sized to fill one Cell. One folder per Tile: lib/forms/tile/<id>/<id>.manifest.json. The registry rows of design/forms.md §8 / 2026-06-11-islands.md §2.2. A Tile knows a SOURCE (population), not a position — that binding is what makes it a Tile (design/forms.md §5).

kind.description: Tile family: surface (canvas, rule, atmosphere, watermark) · chrome (kicker, title, meta, logo, status, footer, progress, pagination) · content (the component DOM) · review (annotation). See design/forms.md §5.

fits.description: The Cell id(s) this Tile may dock in — the dual of the Cell's accepts (design/forms.md §5/§7). Each MUST resolve to a real Cell definition.

z.description: z-plane: 0 canvas · 1 atmosphere · 2 content · 3 chrome · 4 annotation.

population.description: Where the Tile's content comes from — front-matter key, authoring grammar, state variant, the component DOM, or derived (design/forms.md §5). This source-binding is what makes a Tile a Tile.

hideToken.description: The class token that hides this Tile (e.g. no-kicker, no-footer, silent), or null when it has none. From 2026-06-11-islands.md §2.2 'Hide token'.

status.description: shipped · partial · new — the registry's 'Today' column (design/forms.md §5; 2026-06-11-islands.md §2.2).
